ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "tree_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the tree in the model */,
  "nu" REAL /* Regularization parameter (nu) for the model */,
  "cascade_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the cascade in the model */,
  "feature_pool_size" INTEGER /* Size of the feature pool used in the model */,
  "num_test_splits" INTEGER /* Number of test splits used in the model */,
  "oversampling_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of oversampling used in the model */,
  "oversampling_translation_jitter" REAL /* Translation jitter for oversampling */,
  "error" REAL /* Error or loss of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this history entry belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the parameter */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_history_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-collaborator pair */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_collaborators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
